race.description: Racing @ Pinjarra Park Wed August 12 Hcp (C5)
race.comment: POBLANO (7) won fresh in a good form race before tackling Saturday grade last time out. She finished 2.7L away there on a heavy deck and Pike hops back on board today. The wide draw is a query, but Pike hops back on board now and firmer footing this time is a big tick. She can return to winning ways. RAINLINE (2) is racing well in stronger company, finishing 2.4L off the winner last start in a $100k race at Belmont. The form out of that has been red hot and Nottle hops on board now. The inside draw is a big tick and she makes plenty of appeal. COSMIC SPIRIT (11) was solid on resumption after a long layoff, missing by 1.9L at this trip at Northam. The claim of Tsang means she'll carry no weight and the fresh run suggested she can get back to her best. Can put her best foot forward. CATCH CARTER (5) can find the front from barrier six and he'll take catching with the claim of Cheung. BANNERED (3) can bounce back in a big way coming back in trip.
